response.justification: Despite extensive experience, the candidate is overqualified and misaligned with the junior/mid-level role; their resume shows senior/lead roles for over a decade, with no indication of seeking a step-down or entry-level position, and their German language proficiency is only basic despite high on-site requirements in Berlin.
strengths: Extensive TypeScript and Node.js experience across multiple roles
Strong full-stack exposure including React, REST APIs, and PostgreSQL-like SQL usage
Proven track record in open-source and scalable system design
concerns: Overqualified with 10+ years of senior engineering experience, likely to be dissatisfied or leave quickly
Basic German proficiency conflicts with high on-site requirement in Berlin
Resume contains inconsistent name/email (Aisha Okonkwo vs. Szabo Bogdan) raising red flags
